purpose: Minimal navigation map for humans and agents working in this repository.
principle: Do not move Rust crates or tests just to make the tree look clean; keep stable paths and add clear entry points.

start_here.label: Repository overview
start_here.use_when: You need the public summary, quickstart commands, or top-level project identity.

start_here.label: Human navigation dashboard
start_here.use_when: You need to find the right files quickly.

start_here.label: Maintainer roadmap and review map
start_here.use_when: You need to split work across implementers and critics.

domains.name: COMP-3 packed decimal core
domains.summary: Public library and CLI foundation for packed decimal encode/decode, strict/lossless policies, and forensic record workflows.

domains.name: COBOL-to-Rust converter pipeline
domains.summary: Compiler-shaped flow from source normalization through syntax, semantic IR, Rust codegen, and VM-backed execution.

domains.name: Record layout and schema tooling
domains.summary: Shared byte-layout facts and codecs used by CLI schemas and generated converter accessors.

domains.name: Runtime platform and file bindings
domains.summary: Runtime file configuration, generated runtime support, fixed sequential file slice, and future platform hooks.

domains.name: Capability tracking and maintainer planning
domains.summary: Canonical migration status, readiness estimates, task splits, review lanes, and dashboard validation.

domains.name: Validation and oracle tests
domains.summary: Smoke tests, ABYSS fail-closed matrix, GnuCOBOL oracle fixtures, fuzzing, Kani, and local verification docs.

domains.name: Security and red-team material
domains.summary: Security posture, scan summaries, and hardening artifacts for CLI, generated paths, runtime config, and dynamic execution.

domains.name: Automation, release, and project operations
domains.summary: CI workflows, scripts, release notes, contribution rules, and verification entry points.
